title: PRENATAL CARE - 211info
text: NHC TANASBOURNE MEDICAL & DENTAL CLINIC PRENATAL CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Prenatal care offered through partnership with OHSU Hillsboro Medical Clinic. Patients who receive prenatal care at NHC will work with providers to make delivery arrangements at Hillsboro Medical Center. Prenatal care services include routine scheduled exams, lactation education and support, along with birth planning, postpartum, and well baby care. 10690 NE Cornell Road Suite 220 Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm (503) 848-5861 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 848-5861 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to schedule an appointment FEES: Varies, sliding scale fees available DOCUMENTS: Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus line 48 stops on NE Cornell Road and bus 52 stops on 185th Services: Breastfeeding Support Programs Childbirth Education Postpartum Care Prenatal Care Well Baby Care Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY MEDICAL CARE SERVICES SPECIALTY MEDICINE - GENERAL DENTAL CARE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NHC TANASBOURNE MEDICAL & DENTAL CLINIC
